Intraday post (08/July)

Here is my monthly and weekly post. And here is an educational post about trading principles. Next part is coming soon…

The momentum metrics say, that as long as SPX can hold a weekly avg of ~6232, the positive imbalance will still be accumulated.No free lunch in the Taco Bell…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

We have an IC today again at 6260/65-6185/90.The net speed exposure is flat-to-positive into the PM, during the AM it is net flat-to-negative, with its centroid of 6233.28 - 6234.53 (coincidencing with the lvl what the momentum metric projected). This level is a serious pivot after 11.20am.Coding 6248 as the lvl from where the upper wing can start to be magnetic, high effect during the powerhour. By the way, this 6248 lvl is a very stron support or resistance into the powerhour. Until it can provide a top for the momentum, if spot is above the centroid.To the downside, it is 6210.96, especially strong again after 2.50pmAfter Globex session made at 6246 ES=F, it is very likely that they will retest that during the RTH.

I see intraday edge during the first two hours roughly for directional trades. I code max at 6273/80 vanna flip, and min at 6197/6204.The upside can be vacuuming after the open, if spot opens above the centroid. OptionsDepth Heatmap

(Description is here)
